channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Iran Shuts Key Oil Route After Fresh Israeli Strikes on Lebanon, Raising Tensions
item.description: Tensions in the Middle East have escalated as Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz in response to Israeli airstrikes on Lebanon, which resulted in over 100 deaths. The strikes, targeting Hezbollah positio...

item.title: Notable performances by guest stars in Season 4 of ‘Your Face Sounds Familiar’
item.description: The fourth season of 'Your Face Sounds Familiar' continued to capture Filipino audiences with its fun and talent-filled episodes featuring a mix of humor, nostalgia, and impressive impersonations. The...

item.title: Trust TV Secures Top Award for Documentary on Funtua Cotton Factory
item.description: Trust TV don carry home the Best TV Production in Documentary/Feature (English) for their documentary titled 'The Last Cotton Factory in Funtua' at the 2nd Broadcasting Awards. The documentary yarn ab...

item.title: How Nelly Masisi Developed People-Centred Leadership at NMB Plc
item.description: Nelly Masisi, current branch manager at NMB Plc, is a leader whose journey highlights resilience, personal growth, and a focus on people. When tasked with transforming a struggling branch, she realise...

item.title: Marioné Fourie posts world-leading 12.67s hurdles time on home soil at Potchefstroom meet
item.description: South African hurdler Marioné Fourie delivered a strong performance at the Hezekiel Sepeng Invitational in Potchefstroom on Wednesday night, clocking 12.67 seconds in the 100m hurdles. This mark repre...

item.title: Governor Inuwa Yahaya Ends Gombe Cabinet as Political Realignment Looms
item.description: Governor Muhammad Inuwa Yahaya of Gombe State don dissolve the entire Executive Council wey dey serve under him administration. The announcement happen on Wednesday, April 8, 2026, during the 53rd Sta...

item.title: Philippines welcomes US-Iran ceasefire, hopes for lasting peace
item.description: The Philippine Department of Foreign Affairs (DFA) on Wednesday expressed 'cautious optimism' regarding the announcement of a two-week ceasefire between the United States and Iran. The DFA welcomed th...

item.title: Lindelani Mkhize Addresses Internal Dispute Amid Joyous Celebration 30/30 Tour Plans
item.description: Amid an ongoing legal dispute, Lindelani Mkhize, co-founder of the renowned gospel group Joyous Celebration, has issued a public apology, acknowledging that internal conflicts should not have been mad...

item.title: South Africa's Path to Prosperity: Lessons from the 2010 World Cup
item.description: This article reflects on South Africa's potential to achieve significant economic prosperity, drawing parallels to the nation's remarkable success in hosting the 2010 FIFA World Cup. It argues that re...

item.title: Pakistan Brokers US-Iran Ceasefire Amid Growing Tensions
item.description: In a historic diplomatic effort, Pakistan played a crucial role in brokering a two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran, averting a potential catastrophe in the Middle East. This development came af...

item.title: Astronauts Complete Historic Journey Around the Moon
item.description: For the first time in over 50 years, astronauts have journeyed to the moon as part of NASA's Artemis II mission. This mission, launched on Thursday, saw astronauts Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Christi...

item.title: Family of Chris Hani Walks Out of Wreath-Laying Ceremony Amid Dispute
item.description: The annual wreath-laying ceremony in honour of Chris Hani was disrupted when his family walked out of the event, citing a lack of agreement with the involvement of the Ekurhuleni municipality. The fam...

item.title: Matthew Perry’s death linked to ketamine distribution; sentencing underway for accused
item.description: Matthew Perry’s parents, Suzanne and Keith Morrison, attended a federal courthouse in Los Angeles as Jasveen Sangha, known as the 'Ketamine Queen', faced sentencing for her role in the actor’s death. ...

item.title: Sydney developer Conquest to build $300m hotel and housing precinct at Airlie Beach's Coconut Grove
item.description: Sydney-based property developer Conquest has assumed control of plans to construct a $300 million hotel and residential precinct at Coconut Grove in Airlie Beach, Queensland. The project, spanning 14,...

item.title: President Samia urges government to reduce fuel use amid international energy disruptions
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has instructed all government institutions to reduce their fuel consumption immediately due to ongoing global energy shocks affecting supply and prices. She explained tha...

item.title: Changes to Italian citizenship laws complicate plans for expatriates to return
item.description: Recent changes to Italy's citizenship laws are creating unexpected hurdles for Italians abroad who hope to return to their homeland. Many expatriates, including second- and third-generation descendant...

item.title: Batangas police head removed amid misconduct probe
item.description: Brigadier General Hansel Marantan, the Calabarzon police director, has ordered the relief of Colonel Marlon Rufo as Batangas provincial police chief after a female police officer filed an administrati...

item.title: Xavier Trudeau on His Father's Relationship with Katy Perry: 'Just Like Any Other Photo of My Parents'
item.description: Xavier Trudeau, the eldest son of Justin Trudeau and his ex-wife Sophie Grégoire, has shared his thoughts on his father’s relationship with pop star Katy Perry. Speaking on the 'Can’t Be Censored' pod...

item.title: Ex-Rep Accuses Oshio Over Appointments, Cries Marginalisation in Edo Politics
item.description: Former House of Representatives member, Ehiozuwa Johnson Agbonayinma, don throw serious wahala for Edo State APC, accusing former Governor Adams Oshiomhole of monopolising power and appointments. Agbo...

item.title: Canadian dollar strengthens to near two-week high against U.S. dollar following U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement
item.description: The Canadian dollar rose to its strongest level in nearly two weeks against the U.S. dollar on Wednesday after a ceasefire agreement between the United States and Iran improved investor sentiment glob...
